team_round.text: Alex planted four times as many tulips as Patrick planted. Together, they planted 100 tulips. How many tulips did Patrick plant?
Shey buys kazoos in packs of four for $3.00 and sells them in sets of three for $2.85. If she purchases 60 kazoos and sells them all, what is the amount of her profit?

On Sunday, Ashton buys some doughnuts. On Monday, she gives 1/2 of the doughnuts to Rachel. On Tuesday, she gives 1/3 of the remaining doughnuts to Helen. If Ashton has 24 doughnuts left, how many doughnuts did she buy on Sunday?
Doris is twice as old as Boris and three times as old as Morris. If Boris is 8 years older than Morris, how old is Doris?
In how many different ways can 18 be written as a sum of positive perfect squares, if order does not matter?
Yining writes down an arithmetic sequence of 100 terms. The first 5 terms are 32, 35, 38, 41 and 44. What is the sum of Yining’s 100 terms?
Greg has some dimes, nickels and pennies. He has 3 more dimes than nickels and 6 more nickels than pennies. The average value of his coins is 7 cents per coin. How many dimes does Greg have?
